ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking in the league */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "fans_count" INTEGER /* Number of fans/followers on social media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win, draw, loss) */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Score at half-time */,
  "full_time_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game's statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which statistics are recorded */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the opposing team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the game result */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of possession */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season's statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which season statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Total goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  "goals_per_game" REAL /* Average goals scored per game */,
  "goals_against_average" REAL /* Average goals conceded per game */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points earned per game */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (games without conceding a goal) */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards */,
  "average_possession" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  "average_fouls" REAL /* Average number of fouls per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, journalist, fan) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which a prediction is made */,
  "predicted_result" TEXT /* Predicted result of the game (win, draw, loss) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "predicted_goals_for" INTEGER /* Predicted number of goals for the team */,
  "predicted_goals_against" INTEGER /* Predicted number of goals against the team */,
  "predicted_possession_percentage" REAL /* Predicted possession percentage */,
  "predicted_fouls" INTEGER /* Predicted number of fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the venue was last renovated */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the venue owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_venues" (
  "game_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-venue mapping */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators for the specific game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coached by this coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was appointed */,
  "previous_club" TEXT /* Previous club the coach managed */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Honors and achievements of the coach */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the player belongs */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "last_transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's season statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for goalkeepers) */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES team_players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature accessed by the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the feature */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
